textbox.text: I didn't use any startegy, I picked what was best, although it irritated me when I could clearly see a feauture that I saw previously related to a specific gender, but the rest of the face said a completly different story. I was torn beacuse I didn't feel like the presented person was non-binary, they clearly had one specific feature from one gender and the rest from the other that I could easily recognise. After a while I also remembered which face was "orifinally" female and male because they appeared many times.
